splits.title: Soil for Potted Plants
splits.author: Dr. Thomas L. Martin
splits.start_boundary: Soil for Potted Plants By Dr. Thomas L. Martin

files.notes: The file contains two complete articles. The first is a story titled 'The Abundant Harvest' by Mary Hale Woolsey that begins mid-sentence, suggesting it may be a continuation from a previous page. The second is a practical article about soil preparation for potted plants by Dr. Thomas L. Martin. There's also a short poem 'God's Garden' by Merling D. Clyde at the end of the soil article, but it appears to be part of that same article section rather than a separate piece.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for June, each covering different subject areas: Theology/Testimony, Work/Business (Music), Literature (William Henry Drummond), and Social Service (Child Study). Each lesson has its own questions and problems section. The file ends with some advertisements that should be included with the final lesson.
